reviews.review_description: I bought this game a long time ago, and now it’s saying I don’t own the game, but it won’t even let me buy a new one, I even got the DLC’s, every time i try to open the game, it says my free trial has ended

Good game but the ai and teammates are so stupid I’ve played all the games and all the ones with teammates all of them stand there doing nothing it’s so bad to the point were I just never play team games
Game got buns post update AI is way to cracked

I mostly play volleyball and there is A LOT of aim assist in it, serves, I would do a light hit and it would either just sky rocket up or go really far when I would want a short serve, and In receiving/ bumping the ball it is really inaccurate, I play volleyball for fun and you don’treceive with your hands so I recommend adding arms/ wrists that to receive, also, whenever you receive the ball on the side of your arms/hand it should usually be shanked to the side but it doesn’t do that in game, also fix that to make it more realisti . The setting mechanic is so horrible, but I don’t think that problem could be changed. Secondly, the bots, how do they shank a free ball and half the time hit the ball out of bounds. Whenever the bots are setting it’s always behind the 10 foot/three meter line and usually it should be a lot closer then that and closer to the net so you would have more opportunities to hit a cross shot  and it would be a lot easier to spike since I’ve seen a lot of people in multiplayer hit it into the net a lot and I do that also. You should really consider these fixes!

I'm trying so hard to enjoy the game, but on most of the sports they don't give enough time to read the instructions. There isn't a practice mode that I've seen. So you just have to keep restarting. If you missclick, thus hitting the menu button, which is not even the menu button but A/B on the controller, it doesn't pause the game. So you have a menu in your face while the game is still going while trying to figure out how to remove it. I also have a problem with the boosts. If a rally is going too long, they'll offer a chance to hit double/triple speed, which i find unrealistic. I get that it's a VR video game, but I'd rather have the option to remove it. At this point, I'm dropping to keep playing fitness fables instead.

You any update soon 
￼￼

This reminds me of the first time I played Wii and realized the entire device is garbage and no game will ever be any good on it. It's that bad. The sad thing is, VR is not as bad as Wii!

This game is just a TERRIBLE demonstration of how VR can be done. Honestly, not a single mini game I tried could even be described as a working VR experience. In baseball, the strike zero ne was way the hell off to the side where I couldn't reach and the bat could not be held like an actual bat, nor would don't so be helpful. Hockey using the controllers like mice and you gesture to aim a virtual laser pointer at the puck! It's absurd and NOT VR hockey, nor even air hockey. Darts are worse than the paper airplane and rocket throwing in the Oculus demo!

How are devs WORSE than the very first tech demo a device owner plays? I'm getting flashbacks to Kinect--wh the hell couldn't most developers exceed AT LEAST the quality level of Kinect Adventures, a genuinely excellent game even today? Why can't devs do handball or tennis ball, when Cyberix shows they can be done amazingly well...just like Kinect did? 

Honestly, if you want to break people's faith in VR, tell them this POS is good. This is Roblox quality, people. You are all chumps for rating this over 🕑.
Wasn’t expecting too much, but this is actually really fun! I love the MR option!

reviews.review_title: Edit: The tennis physics have changed.
reviews.review_description:
EDIT Oct 22, 2025:  (Changed from five star to two star.) I love the tennis game and have played it since I bought the game almost two years ago. But two updates ago, they changed the tennis physics and now I cannot even finish a game. It used to be that the ball would come to me, with some movement by me, but not a lot. Now, I get moved towards the ball, and I will suddenly find myself on the left or right side of the court, or even at the net, when I don't want to do that! With the way they changed the physics, I now get motion sick. I can't find any settings to give you the choice for how you want to move. Unless this changes, the tennis part of this game has become unusable for me, and tennis is the main sport I play.

ORIGINAL POST Jan 6, 2024: Each sport is well done and there is a large variety to choose from. It is great for exercise. I love this app EXCEPT for one thing . . . the announcer saying in a loud voice at the end of a game, "You lose!" You see, I get plenty of exercise but I lose a lot.  Just be aware of that very annoying voice. (Even if the announcer said, "Opponent wins," that would be better.) Everything else is great, a five star game.
I would have given a higher rating but the support is just not there i have emailed them with questions and issues and there is no response.
Great sports game with every sports you want would love a snooker mode and a tournament mode for billiards and boxing all the sports mode etc
Its basically wii sports but in vr and its not even bad for the price

Kung fu hockey and soccer are NOT included even though they are listed in the game, you must buy them separate. You need to change the web description to 13 games not 16.. its false advertising and very misleading. The games we get are fun but its offputting to be lied to..

I bought the combo all in one and summer sports, thinking it would be a good little game. I was interested in table tennis, tennis, and archery most of all. 
Let me tell you, the physics on each game i tried was absolutely terrible. The table tennis ball has a low frame rate. The game is pretty much unplayable. Tennis doesn't allow you to not move freely or teleport. Archery was ok though you are transported at the speed of the arrow to the target, vomit inducing. And billiard has bonkers movements, its almost impossible to get in a good spot, and they do not show where the ball will bounce if you hit a band first. There is no practice session, you need to play a game even in single player. And THERE IS NO MENU WITH OPTIONS!!! 
COME ON GUYS!
you can only deactivate sound fx or background music, both low quality and repetitive, but no movement option or comfort options. Also, the menu does not pause the game! If you open the menu during a tennis game, in singlemplayer. The game continues!

As you can imagine, I was pretty disapointed especially as the game as a solid score. And lo amd behold, probably because i got a pack, even if I played 15min at most, I can't be refunded!

So now I guess that I will have this sore thumb of a game taking dust, and that 25 quid gone to the bin.

The game has potential as a concept, but it doesn't seem like the devs care about that.

Now, I love this game so much. One of the first things I bought when I got my headset. But you need to fix some things. The reason I'm writing this, is because sometimes, RANDOMLY, in baseball, the game just breaks. It doesn't let you make contact with the ball. Like the bat hitbox is gone or something. And it's so annoying when I'm losing in a game, and I can't do anything to try and win, because the pitcher can just throw balls in the zone and strike me out. This makes me so upset when ever it happens. Please try to fix it 🙏
I like the game it’s great, would def recommend boxing but they changed the tennis and now it is really annoying to play.

This sports game is just incredible and it makes you feel like your actually there! It’s just such a good game for family and friends and to play online speaking of online the community is really great and it’s sooooo fun just to play baseball or boxing but please maybe add these sports to improve the game 😄


I would love to see cricket maybe

Or dodge ball?

These three would definitely be tricky but ice hockey,rugby or like American-football and  maybe wrestling 

You know netball would be cool

And handball

Like a real football at an actual stadium 

Futsal? Probably not


Ooo canoeing would be nice


I wouldn’t really say lacrosse but definitely skiing 





And most of all a third game it would be brilliant 🤩 maybe like Olympics  games


Just saying these are ideas and thank you so much for this wonderful game I would definitely recommend and it’s cheap oh yeah and I love kung fu it feels like something straight out of a movie  and possibly add the most forgettable sports ever no offence croquet? 



9.7/10

Oh yeah and ii bought kung fu but now I don’t have it please help me with  this

developer_response.body:
First of all, thank you so much for loving our game and leaving such sincere feedback. 😊
"Speaking as if you were actually in the stadium" is a great strength to all of the development team!

We will take note of it when adding other events in future updates.

You said that Kung Fu is not available at the moment.
If you send us detailed information about the current situation to minjae@appnori.com, we will resolve it.
We apologize for the inconvenience.

reviews.review_description:
I enjoy playing all the sports.  However,  I think there needs to be a replay feature for when a player makes a good shot or move.  The feature that was added with the coin flip needs to be removed. It doesn't make any sense to have a coin flip especially on games that aren't turn related.  It just doesn't need to be there.  It's more of an aggravation.  Also,  I think there needs to be more customization features to pick from like style, hairstyles, etc. but as far as the game goes it's fun. I would like to see some sort of championship feature players can enter like a tournament going against other players and be named the champion for each sport but make accessible after the single play matches are completed. Just an idea.  
Four stars because of the coin toss. Sorry.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for playing with enjoyment.
In the case of coin toss,
there are some events where serving or first attack is important,
so I updated it.
If there are many negative opinions about coin toss,
we will consider other methods in the future.
Thank you.

reviews.review_description:
this game is excellent, amazing, and so much fun, even when you pick the game in different way, by pick up the avatar and put in into start area..not just by point & click..👍
If I may requests:
- table tennis: please an option/setting to move scoring number not in the table
-  archery: an option/setting not to moving forward, follow the arrow after release, it's kind of motion sickness.
thanks.

I write this for all european who thinks about buying this game , it's worth it only if u want to play solo or against a Friend in prívate.
There's no ranked serv in EU only USA and Asia and on those serveur the ping is si high that u litteraly can't play a single game , screen freeze and then sped up making any sport impossible to play.
I highly recommend not to buy this game if u want to play ranked , it's just impossible

developer_response.body:
We sincerely appreciate your detailed feedback and sincerely apologize for any inconvenience.
You are right. Our servers are currently located in the US, which is causing latency issues for European players.
We are actively looking into expanding our servers, and improving the online experience for European players is a top priority on our roadmap.
We sincerely appreciate your support and patience, and we look forward to sharing more news with you soon.
Your honest reviews are a huge help in making the game even better. Thank you again.

reviews.review_description: Great mini games. Quick setup and getting started. Excellent entertainment with a 'WII' vibe. Games are short and to the point, but there are lots of different games and modes.
THE BOWLING IS WAY TO HARD. IF YOU MESS UP EVEN ONCE ON LV 4 YOU MIGHT ASWELL GIVE UP. PLS THE DEVS OF THE GAME, IF YOU ARE READING THIS, PLS MAKE IT A LITTLE EASIER
A lot of sport to fun. The lastest mixed reality update make this game deserve 5 star.
Where is the option to set the game to left handed? I cannot find it. It's there right?
Enjoy playing the games with family and with bots. Great variety.
I would like it if you added Pickleball and hockey and also I gave us a five star rating cause it’s pretty good and if you do add it is it OK if you reach out to me because I’d love that

developer_response.body:
Currently hockey is available as DLC.
Thank you for your positive review.

reviews.review_description: Fencing would be fun to add

reviews.review_title: Fun game.  Not matched up by skill level
reviews.review_description:
Fun game.  Especially like tennis and volleyball.
Tennis games are not matched up by skill level, though. If you have 50 or 60 matches played in total, you shouldn't be matched up against players who have 12k plus games. Please keep the game fair so your win rate is accurate and based off of playing games with others with similar skill and experience levels.  Thanks

Update 6/13.  

I'm still not matched up by skill level (just completed a game against someone with thousands more games played than I have).

1) Please match up games based on skill levels to keep things fair.

2) If you are already playing a game and about to finish it, please give the player the option to accept or reject a match game if it becomes available.  I was about to complete my game against the computer and shut down, but at the last minute, I was put up against a competitor (with far more experience).  That has happened several times now.

3) The game glitched a bit today, and my racket kept getting disconnected, so I would automatically lose points.  If there are technical issues,  you should have the option to restart the game or end it without automatic loss if your controller isn't working properly and there is a lag in the game 

I would give a 5 star review of the game if these issues were fixed, as it can be a fun game when matched appropriately and when the glitches don't occur.

Thank you.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your kind words and thoughtful feedback!
We are especially happy that you are enjoying playing the Tennis and Volleyball games!
We totally agree that fair matchmaking is essential for the balance of the competition.
We will have internal discussions on this issue and do our best to match players based on skill level.
Our goal is to provide a more enjoyable and fair competitive environment for everyone, and your feedback plays an important role in helping us achieve that goal.
Thanks again for taking the time to share your thoughts!

reviews.review_description: Why has the multiplayer password option (private room) stopped working???

developer_response.body: Please check if it is the same server or version. Please send details to minjae@appnori.com and we will resolve it.

reviews.review_title: I would like to refund this app
reviews.review_description: Please help I would like to refund this app but it said refund not approved a would reallly appreciate it if I could get some compensation or this app be refunded.

developer_response.body:
As developers, we do not have control over billing or refunds. 
For refund inquiries, please contact Meta directly. 
We are sorry, but we cannot issue refunds directly. 
Thank you for your understanding.

reviews.review_title: Good games and a great workout as well
reviews.review_description: There’s a good selection of games. Some games are a great workout such as the boxing, racket ball and tennis

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the great review!
We’re glad to hear you enjoyed both the gameplay and the workout experience.
We’ll keep working to bring you more fun and active games. 
Stay healthy and have fun!

reviews.review_title: Diving and full team and jumping
reviews.review_description: I love the game, but volleyball needs a diving mechanic because sometimes the npc spikes get blocked and I can’t reach it and add a full team of 6 players. And also try to make a a jumping serve.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your good opinion. I will discuss this with the person in charge.

reviews.review_description: This game might be ok for small children.  I tried it for maybe 10 mins and realized it wasn't my cup of tea.  I tried to request for a refund the next day and was told that a "bundle" games are not eligible for a refund.  I guess it's my fault for not reading the terms.  I've definitely learned a lesson this time.  Stay away from bundles unless it's a game you know for sure you would like.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for sharing your experience and feedback. 
We apologize for any issues you may have encountered with the bundle refund policy.

reviews.review_description: Hey Amy chance adding snooker to Billiards? That would be awesome Ty!

developer_response.body: Let me check out what snooker is like. Thanks for the great advice.

reviews.review_description: It's really fun with a lot of variety. The best games are boxing, volleyball, squash, baseball, and golf, but the other ones are still very fun. It's cheaper and better than sports scramble. Can customize, play with friends, and even watch other people's games. I am very happy with my decision to buy this game.

developer_response.body:
Thank you! 
I’m so glad to hear you’re enjoying the game. 
It’s great to know you’re happy with the variety of sports, playing with friends, and customization options. Your feedback means a lot, and we’ll keep working to provide an even better experience!

reviews.review_title: basketball sucks, everything else is goo
reviews.review_description: basketball should at least be a half court game, and it doesn’t have to be long, it can be short like baseball.

The game is really good but some of the games are way too easy. In baseball almost every single hit is a homerun. Also boxing is really easy. Other than some of the games being too easy, the game is pretty good.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your good opinion. In the future, we will try to update the AI ​​performance of baseball and boxing to make them more challenging.

reviews.review_description: Very, very fun. All of sport to play for easy or hard levels . Also , many updates and add-on games and feature!

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your good review. 
We will continue to update to provide you with new experiences.

reviews.review_description: I bought this game and it was horrible the game is trash it’s not relic it’s not like what it looks like in the ad

developer_response.body: Please let us know what you are dissatisfied with and we will fix it in a future update.

reviews.review_description:
I bought All-in-One Sports VR when it was on sale for $9.99, and I’m really impressed! My favorites are quite possibly the bowling, badminton, and hockey games. Playing this reminds me of Wii Sports and it feels like an upgraded Switch Sports… but in VR!

Only downside is there’s no practice mode for any of the games included, but other than that, it’s a solid title to add to your Oculus/Meta Quest library if you want to play some sport related games! (Get it while it’s on sale though!)

developer_response.body:
Thank you for the good review.
We thought of singles as a practice mode.
However, there were often people who mentioned practice mode.
I'm considering adding it here as well.
We will try to add it in a future update.

reviews.review_description: Never used to like Squash but I do Now

developer_response.body:
I know about wii sports but I don't know what you are talking about.
Thank you for your good review.

reviews.review_title: What Switch Sports wishes it was
reviews.review_description:
LOVE this game. I was a hardcore Wii sports kid back in the day, so I’ve been looking for something to replace it for ages. Was super stoked when Switch Sports came out but honestly, it paled in comparison. So I thought I was out of luck- and then I got a VR and found this game! *chefs kiss* 
The only real complaint I have is I wish games like bowling, darts and archery had like, I guess a “practice” mode. Sometimes I don’t want to be competitive, I just want to play/improve my skills. I don’t play online, just against the bots but in games I’m not good at, it sucks getting my butt kicked every time I want to play.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your good comments.
About practice mode
We will carefully consider
We will be able to add it in a future update.
Thank you for your deep interest.

reviews.review_description: 8/10 give this game pass thought and 10/10 this is what vr was made for games like this

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the great review!
I'm so happy to hear that "VR is for this".
We're working hard to bring you even more immersive updates to the game. Stay tuned. And thanks again for playing!

reviews.review_description:
The game and way to play is fun , but judging through table tennis player , the physics is not realistic at all its just reacts from you stick movement , its mosty like how wii sports  and sports resorts games do  , so if you like wii spirts series you will deffinitely like it , but fir DLCs , the price might made me not convinced to buy them esp from the physics basec and there might be better other choices , i might suggest for the team to make different
game with more better engine

Thank you for saying it's a fun game.

DLC is not necessarily a must-buy.
If someone else plays the DLC game, you can play multiplayer with them even if you don't buy the DLC.

Bowling..golf..boxing..darts..pool...tennis and more

Thank you for the good review.

reviews.review_title: Can’t play with anyone I know
reviews.review_description: My friend and I both have All in One and the link to send an invite (assuming that’s how u play with someone u know) is locked saying we are not joinable - even tho both our profiles are set to joinable- spent 2 hours last night trying to figure this out- fun game but really want to play online with friends

developer_response.body: Thanks for letting me know. I'll check that out.

reviews.review_description:
I tested this game several months ago, and at the time, I wasn't convinced, mainly because the animations were not very clear and there was a lack of variety in the sports offered. Today, I bought the game and I'm truly impressed by the work done by the developers. The animations are now beautiful and crystal-clear; I believe it can't get any better on the Quest 3. The gameplay is also very enjoyable, but I’d encourage the developers to continue refining the experience. Why not add more levels to the games and include other sports like curling, pétanque, or even board games like chess, which are also considered sports, right?

Once again, great job—this is what I appreciate in game developers: their ability to not abandon their projects and to improve them month after month. Please, keep pleasing us, you're geniuses! This game is a must-have, it should be in everyone's library, no exceptions.

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for your valuable feedback and warm words of support! 
We are very happy to hear that you are satisfied with the animation and improvements in various areas. 
We will continue to strive to provide a richer experience with various content, such as adding levels and introducing new sports. 
We will also review chess, curling, and petanque as positively as possible.

We sincerely thank you for trusting and supporting us, and we will do our best to provide you with an enjoyable experience in the future!

reviews.review_description:
It keeps freezing up on me when I play it 
I really want my money back because I can’t play the game!!!! $19.99 I want a refund!!! 😡🤯🤬 I expect you all to deliver and you don’t!!!

developer_response.body:
We apologize for any inconvenience.
If we know what the situation is, we can fix it.

reviews.review_title: Upgrade messed up weight of Tennis ball
reviews.review_description: Since the upgrade today, I feel nothing everytime I hit the ball playing tennis. There is no vibration or weight to ball. I change the Hepatics, but there is no difference, no matter how much I increase the vibration. NOTHING!  Can't get any exercise this way. Please fix or go back to previous version.  DOn't care how the avatars look. Why mess up something that wasn't BROKE! If this doesn't improve, I'm going to request a refund.

reviews.review_title: Ruined our Thanksgiving - worst app ever
reviews.review_description: My sister and I are 3000 miles apart.  I told her to buy Sports VR and we were so excited to play sports in virtual reality on Thanksgiving day.  We had it all planned out.  We spent a frustrating and infuriating three hours trying to get Multi-Player to work.  Only to find out it doesn't.  You can only play with random strangers.   It also has a Password function that comes with no instructions.  Thanks for Sports VR for ruining our holiday forever!  I warn everyone, stay away from this App.

reviews.review_title: Great move,hope to see more games soon!
reviews.review_description:
Recommend 1st buy on VR

Have purchase on quest 2 & steam,why quest pc need to purchase again? Not cross buy


Hope to see more games soon like


（kendo，sumo，soccer，sailboat，Taekwondo ，，darts，surfboard，cycle，skateboard ，parkour and etc）

So many games in one,  they have tennis which I didn't know about, I thought it was just ping pong, its cool that there so many modes to choose from. Each is fun and well designed, good exercise too. Definetly a must have game for anyone with a quest. 

Hope to see the game keep evolving and get more sports, and modes for each sport!

developer_response.body:
We are grateful for your support of our sport games.
At the moment, five new sports are being developed simultaneously.
This will continue to be our goal to meet your expectations.

reviews.review_title: This game wont let you down!
reviews.review_description: This is a go to everytime i use my oculus. A must have in everyones library. I’m surprised its not in the official oculus store.

developer_response.body:
Our goal is to continue to develop this game without rushing, believing that the full version will provide us with a chance to meet more users through continuous updates.
We are grateful for your supportive comments.

reviews.review_description:
This game is good but there's some things that they can do to make it better,
And also i think there's about 10 games in there but like 3 of them are tennis, why not group them together and and more games? Here's games that i think they should add:
.
- sword play
.
- football
.
- hockey
.
And i think before adding more games they should improve motion tracking more...  Also the bow Archer game is way too easy because of the zooming in just put a simple Lazer pointer to make it a little hard....

But overall great game I'm having lots of fun!

developer_response.body:
Thanks for the good comments.
Adding more sports is a challenge we must pursue.
We will collect various opinions presented by users so that we can add games that are suitable for our current game.

reviews.review_description:
I just purchased the game and tested out all the different sports and I think this is a winner! I really think this will become one of those games that new Quest2 users will get.

The physics seem really good and overall it's been a pleasant experience.  I do think the Tennis, Archery (Arrow cam), and Batmanton could benefit from a teleport setting. Generally, new Quest users are not used to all the movement in VR and that could cause some people to not want to play those sports. The camera moves quite fast when you play the ball in Tennis for example and that can be disorientating. Maybe add an option to black out the screen when moving to the next position like some of the other sports games do?

That being said good job Devs! Lots of fun!

developer_response.body:
In billiards, blacking the screen when rotating or moving was applied. However, in the case of tennis and badminton, there was an internal test that teleporting was more confusing and dizzy. I will test it again and decide whether to apply.
Thanks for the great idea.
Merry Christmas!

reviews.review_description:
It's the first game I bought on my Oculus Quest 2 and I don't regret at all ! Tons of fun. The game is like "Wii sports".
One only little problem, I had some issues to find some players online. I didn't achieve to play online yet.

developer_response.body:
To make multiplayer smoother, we're working on an update that will allow matches to be played randomly without choosing a region or sport.
We will come up with a number of ways to update the multiplayer to make it more interesting.
Thank.

reviews.review_description: Very enjoyable game! My favorite one is pingpong

developer_response.body:
How about this updated tennis?
If you like ping-pong, you'll probably like tennis.
thank you.

reviews.review_description: This app is so cool. All games run smoothly.

developer_response.body:
We will focus more on optimization so that you can play smoothly and comfortably.
Thanks for the review.

reviews.review_title: Probably the best Quest 2 sports game
reviews.review_description:
I really like how there is so many different sports game offered at a competitive price. It really gives me the feeling of WII sports but even better. There are some kinks that need to be worked out and I am hoping that the dev team will listen to users for feedback. 

I mostly bought it to play the baseball game but the other games are really fun too. I especially like golf, tennis, bad Minton, Billiards, and bowling. 

For the baseball mode, it would be nice to have the option for lefty batting and righty pitching or vice versa. I have to switch between lefty and right between each innings. Also, I wish it was more than 3 innings. Another thing is that it seems like the AI is cracked in this game and is always hitting perfect hits, and my defense doesn’t seem to perform as well as the AI’s. The pitching is great, I love the different pitching options and how there is a limit on each pitch type to make it more competitive. I feel like the batting could use some work, but man is it satisfying to hit a home run. The strike zone can also be tricky when pitching, as it looks like it should’ve been a strike but it wasn’t. I think the issue is the blurryness of the strike zone. 

Overall this game is already worth the money and I’m sure with a larger user base and updates could be the best sports game on the quest store.

developer_response.body:
We overlooked the idea that baseball needs a left/right throw option. Currently, the left and right hand selection is applied to all sports, so it may be a little difficult to modify just baseball.
Reinforcing the defense and hitting AI is a very important issue, so we will continue to update it.
The strike zone will be modified to be more visible in the next update.
Thanks for the detailed and favorable review.
